zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Poynings於1387年之前出生在英國英格蘭素可時，她的父親Richard Poynings31歲，母親Isabel FitzPayn25歲。她於1402年之前與Richard Camoys在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年在英國素可特洛頓，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Poynings于1387年之前出生在英国英格兰素可时，她的父亲Richard Poynings31岁，母亲Isabel FitzPayn25岁。她于1402年之前与Richard Camoys在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年在英国素可特洛頓，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Poynings was born before 1387, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Poynings, was 31 and her mother, Isabel FitzPayn, was 25. She married Richard Camoys before 1402, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1421, in Trotton, Sussex, England, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Poynings est née avant 1387, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Poynings, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzPayn, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Camoys avant 1402, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1421, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Poynings vor 1387 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Poynings 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel FitzPayn 25. Sie hat vor 1402 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Camoys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1421 in Trotton, Sussex, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Poynings è nata il prima del 1387 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Poynings, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel FitzPayn, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Richard Camoys prima del 1402, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1421, nel Trotton, Sussex, England, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Poyningsが1387年以前にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Richard Poyningsは31歳，母Isabel FitzPaynは25歳であった。1402年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRichard Camoysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年にイギリススセックストロットオンで死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Poynings(이)가 1387년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Poynings(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzPayn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1402년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Richard Camoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Poynings nasceu antes 1387, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Poynings, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzPayn, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Camoys antes 1402, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1421, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: виллалпандо, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Poynings родилась перед 1387 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Poynings было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzPayn, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Camoys перед 1402 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1421 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
